description: Save cards for future payments using Vault API v3 — with or without an initial purchase

with_purchase.description: Save a card while processing a payment — buyer pays and card is vaulted simultaneously
flow: 2. Buyer enters card via Card Fields
4. On success: card is vaulted automatically
5. Receive VAULT.PAYMENT-TOKEN.CREATED webhook with payment token
6. Store payment token server-side for future use

without_purchase.description: Save a card without an initial payment — setup token flow
flow: 1. Server: POST /v3/vault/setup-tokens with card payment source
2. Client: Render Card Fields for buyer to enter card details
3. Buyer submits card (3D Secure if required)
4. Server: POST /v3/vault/payment-tokens with setup token ID
5. Store payment token server-side for future charges

use_saved_card.description: Charge a previously saved card using the vault payment token

security: ALWAYS store payment tokens server-side with encryption
ALWAYS associate tokens with authenticated users
ALWAYS validate vault permissions in PayPal Developer Dashboard
ALWAYS implement customer consent for saving cards
NEVER store payment tokens in client-side storage
